latin: Semper pecunia est in taberna bananaria! nonne intellegis? pecuniam ibi celavi. in muris tabernarum bananas vendentium semper pecunia latet.

questions.target: In the walls of the banana stand
choices: In the walls of the banana stand

questions.prompt: What is the speaker frustrated about?
questions.target: That no one understands where the money is
choices: That no one understands where the money is

translation: There's always money in the banana stand! Don't you understand? I hid money there. In the walls of the banana-selling stands, money always lies hidden.
